questions.text: Explain the relevance and adverse effects of greenhouse gases.
Discuss the two types of monsoon in Indian subcontinent.
State the major data requirements of hazard mapping and the 3 sources for obtaining these data.
State the principle of qualitative risk assessment and the method of expressing risk qualitatively.
State the different types of disaster response
List six international relief organizations
Distinguish between risk communication and crisis communication.
List the structural and nonstructural measures in capacity building
State the legislations in India on disaster management
Explain the interrelation of National Disaster Management Policy with other national policies.
Categorize the various layers of atmosphere based on their distance from earth and explain the features of each layer with a neat diagram.
Define the following terms: a) Disaster b) Hazard c)Risk
State and explain crisis counselling. Identify the necessity of crisis counselling.
Identify the reasons for the depletion of Ozone layer. Suggest two initiatives which can be implemented at home to prevent this.
Define hazard mapping. Explain the two approaches of hazard mapping.

In Kerala for the past 5 years, the average number of road accidents is 44076 per year and 1 death occurs in every 10 accidents. Considering the population as 3.33 crores, assess the risk of being killed in driving an automobile in terms of societal and individual risk.
Explain the four different types of vulnerability. List any four socio-economic indicators of human capital as livelihood asset.
Outline the two major physical vulnerability assessment approaches.
Explain the core elements of disaster risk management.
State the requirements for effective disaster response.
Define the term ‘disaster risk reduction’. Explain the measures for disaster risk reduction.
Define ‘relief’ in the context of disaster management. Identify the principles guiding relief.
Describe the effective ways of promoting stakeholder participation in disaster risk reduction. State its benefits.
Explain the basic steps in participatory stakeholder engagement.
Explain capacity building, relevance of capacity assessment and the different methods of assessing capacity in disaster risk management.
State the barriers to effective communication in disaster management.
Explain the common disaster types in India.
State the objectives and main elements of national disaster management policy.
State the targets, priorities and guiding principles of Sendai Framework for disaster risk reduction.
Explain the institutional arrangement for disaster management in India
